questionText: Are any of your operations or activities regulated by a carbon pricing system (i.e. ETS, Cap & Trade or Carbon Tax)?
questionKo: 탄소가격시스템 ( 예 : ETS, 배출권거래제 또는 탄소세 ) 의 규제를 적용받는 사업장이나 활동이 있습니까 ?
sectorTags: Oil & Gas, Coal, General, Aviation, Capital goods, Transport OEMS - EPM, Chemicals, Metals & mining, Transport services, Steel, Agricultural commodities, Transport OEMS, Energy utilities & power generators, Cement, Food, beverage & tobacco, Paper & forestry, Real estate, Construction
simpleHelp: Companies are requested to report whether they are subject to, or potentially subject to, mandatory carbon pricing systems. This question has evolved to include whether companies are currently regulated by a carbon pricing system - including carbon markets or taxation - or whether they expect to be regulated in the future. Companies responding "Yes" will be further prompted to identify the systems in which they participate and to provide additional details about their exposure to these systems. This information allows investors to consistently track and analyze corporate expectations and the associated costs of carbon pricing regulations, and forces unregulated companies to consider potential future exposure.
baseOptions: No, but we anticipate being regulated in the next three years
No, and we do not anticipate being regulated in the next three years

guidance.text:
General 
Companies responding "Yes" will be further prompted to identify the systems in which they participate and to provide additional details about their exposure to these systems.
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 해당 문항에서 CDP가 요청하는 작성 내용을 설명합니다. 위 응답방법, 열 구조, 드롭다운 선택지를 기준으로 보고연도와 조직 범위에 맞는 정보를 입력하십시오.

guidance.text:
Carbon pricing policies: Carbon pricing is a key policy mechanism to drive greenhouse gas emissions reductions and mitigate the dangerous impacts of climate change. Policies primarily manifest in one of two ways; or, in some countries, areas and regions, both ways:
An emissions trading scheme
, also known as a cap and trade system, is a market-based allowance system in which participants can buy and sell a set amount of allowances based on their emissions levels. Low emitters will have allowances left over for sale, which higher emitters will buy to offset their emissions - operating in a demand and supply scenario.
A carbon tax attaches a fee to carbon emissions.
These policies in practice vary specifically on a case-by-case basis.
For more information, please see:
State and Trends of Carbon Pricing 20 22 . World Bank, 2022. 
Carbon Pricing Dashboard 
CDP's Technical Note Carbon Pricing: CDP Disclosure Best Practice
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 응답 작성 시 참고할 수 있는 추가 설명입니다. 필요한 경우 관련 기준, 방법론, 내부 검토 자료를 근거로 활용하십시오.

sectorTagsKo: 석유 및 가스, 석탄, 일반, 항공, 자본재, 운송 OEM - EPM, 화학, 금속 및 광업, 운송 서비스, 철강, 농산물 원자재, 운송 OEM, 에너지 유틸리티 및 발전, 시멘트, 식품, 음료 & 담배, 제지 및 임업, 부동산, 건설
simpleHelpKo: 이 문항은 '탄소가격시스템 (예: ETS, 배출권거래제 또는 탄소세) 의 규제를 적용받는 사업장이나 활동이 있습니까?'에 대한 배경 설명입니다. CDP 응답자는 보고연도 기준으로 조직의 환경 관련 현황, 리스크, 기회, 성과 또는 관리체계를 문항의 응답 구조에 맞춰 설명해야 합니다.
